title: Glenmark Launches Generic Olanzapine Injection in US, Targets USD 25.4 Million Market
summary: New Delhi: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA, a subsidiary of Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Limited, has announced the launch of Olanzapine for Injection, 10 mg/vial, Single-Dose Vial in the United...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
New Delhi: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA, a subsidiary of Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Limited, has announced the launch of Olanzapine for Injection, 10 mg/vial, Single-Dose Vial in the United States.

The product is bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to the reference listed drug Zyprexa IntraMuscular Injection 10 mg/vial of Cheplapharm Registration GmbH.

According to IQVIA sales data for the 12-month period ending May 2026, the Zyprexa IntraMuscular Injection market recorded annual sales of approximately USD 25.4 million.

Commenting on the launch, Marc Kikuchi, President & Business Head, North America, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA, said, "The launch of Olanzapine for Injection underscores our strategic focus on growing a robust injectables portfolio and strengthening our presence within the institutional channel. It reflects our continued commitment to expanding access to quality and affordable treatment options to meet the evolving needs of patients and healthcare providers."

The company noted that its Olanzapine for Injection, 10 mg/vial, Single-Dose Vial is approved only for the indications listed in Glenmark's approved prescribing information. It also clarified that the IQVIA market data reflects sales across all approved indications of the reference listed drug and available therapeutic equivalents, while Glenmark's product will be marketed only for its approved indications.

Sheeba Farhat Joined Medical Dialogues in 2018 to report on the latest Education news. A Graduate of the University of Delhi, she specializes in covering stories related to Medical Education updates. For inquiries or further information, you can reach her at editorial@medicaldialogues.in.
